note: seq=109: (1) FIX EDGAR -- create the missing atlas-edgar.service + .timer (EDGAR only ever ran once; no timer existed, so enable/start no-oped -> 'inactive'). Now a real daily timer -> EDGAR cycles + stays 20/20 active. (2) Throttle backfill DEEPER 20k->10k/30min (~333/min << ~1000-1777 drain) so the ~1.31M deep-reenrich queue DRAINS DOWN (safe slow drain), not just holds. EDGAR collector verified (has main + --selftest).

steps.note: seq=109: create EDGAR timer (fix the 1 inactive unit) + throttle backfill to drain queue.

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS EDGAR (SEC) collector
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_edgar_import.py
TimeoutStartSec=600

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS EDGAR daily collector

[Timer]
OnBootSec=8min
OnCalendar=*-*-* 06:10:00
Persistent=true
RandomizedDelaySec=600

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS re-enrichment backfill (throttled to DRAIN the queue down)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
IOSchedulingClass=idle
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
Environment=ATLAS_REQUEUE_N=10000
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_requeue.py 10000
TimeoutStartSec=120

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS backfill timer (30min, throttled -> queue drains)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=5min
OnUnitActiveSec=30min
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-edgar.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-edgar.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','atlas-edgar.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-edgar.service']); s.run(['systemctl','restart','atlas-backfill.timer']); print('edgar timer created+started; backfill throttled to drain')"
